# HHZ Respiratory Review

> India's independent respiratory-equipment reference for oxygen concentrators, CPAP, and BiPAP devices sold in India. Products are scored against a published rubric. No sponsored placement and no brand veto.

HHZ currently tracks 96 oxygen concentrator product records, 78 oxygen concentrator reviews, 26 CPAP/BiPAP product records, 26 CPAP/BiPAP reviews, 71 comparison records, and 71 written comparison pages. The guide library has 46 buyer guides, 6 city-specific 5 LPM buying pages, 30 city service/dealer/repair/price/rental pages, and the clinical library has 72 educational explainers.

Home Medix models in the catalogue: Home Medix HM-KX 10 LPM, Home Medix HM-KV 5 LPM, Home Medix HM-BV-30 BiPAP, Home Medix HM-CV-20 Auto CPAP. They are scored in the same product and comparison framework as Philips, Oxymed, ResMed, Nidek, DeVilbiss, BMC, Yuwell, and other brands.

## Editorial policies

- [About HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/about/): what HHZ covers and how the rubric is applied
- [Methodology](https://homehealthzone.com/methodology/): scoring methodology and testing protocol
- [Editorial policy](https://homehealthzone.com/editorial-policy/): independence, loaners, sponsorship, and corrections
- [Correction policy](https://homehealthzone.com/correction-policy/): timestamped corrections with original wording preserved
- [Contact](https://homehealthzone.com/contact/)

## Top 5 category rankings

- [Top 5 10 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/10-lpm-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 10 LPM high-flow oxygen concentrators for India 2026: Home Medix HM-KX, Oxymed 10 Dual Flow, Nidek Nuvo 10, DeVilbiss 10 LPM, Fitmate 10 LPM.
- [Top 5 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/5-lpm-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 5 LPM oxygen concentrators for India 2026: Philips EverFlo, AirSep Visionaire 5, DeVilbiss Compact 525, Nidek Nuvo Lite, Home Medix HM-KV.
- [Top 5 BiPAP Machines in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/bipap-machines/): HHZ editorial top 5 BiPAP machines for India 2026: ResMed Lumis 150, Lumis 100, AirCurve 10 V Auto, Home Medix HM-BV-30, Philips DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS.
- [Top 5 CPAP Machines in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/cpap-machines/): HHZ editorial top 5 CPAP machines for India 2026: ResMed AirSense 10 AutoSet, AirSense 11 AutoSet, Breas Z2 Auto, ResMed AirMini, Home Medix HM-CV-20.
- [Top 5 Indian-Made Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/indian-made-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 Indian-manufactured oxygen concentrators for 2026: Home Medix HM-KV, Oxymed Mini, Medtechlife OXYTEC Smart, Helix Inspiron, Nareena 5 LPM — ranked by CDSCO licence trail, indigenous-build purity, and concentrator-specific evidence.
- [Top 5 Oxygen Concentrators for COPD Home Use in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/oxygen-concentrators-for-copd/): HHZ editorial top 5 oxygen concentrators for COPD long-term home oxygen therapy in India: Oxymed Mini, Home Medix HM-KV, AirSep Visionaire 5, Nidek Nuvo Lite, DeVilbiss 5 LPM — ranked by chronic-use suitability, warranty depth, and service-network reach.
- [Top 5 Oxygen Concentrators for Senior Care at Home in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/oxygen-concentrators-for-senior-care/): HHZ editorial top 5 oxygen concentrators for elderly home care in India: Home Medix HM-KV, AirSep Visionaire 5, Oxymed Mini, Nidek Nuvo Lite, Philips Respironics SimplyGo — ranked for caregiver accessibility, alarm coverage, quiet operation, and senior-friendly controls.
- [Top 5 Oxygen Concentrators Under ₹40,000 in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/oxygen-concentrators-under-40000/): HHZ editorial top 5 oxygen concentrators under ₹40,000 in India for 2026: Home Medix HM-KV, Oxymed Mini, Nareena 5 LPM, Evox 5 LPM, GVS Oxypure — ranked on spec, indigenous-build credentials, and CDSCO licence trail rather than headline discount alone.
- [Top 5 Portable Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/portable-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 portable oxygen concentrators for India 2026: Inogen One G5, SeQual Eclipse 5, Invacare Platinum Mobile, Philips SimplyGo Mini, Caire Freestyle Comfort 5.
- [Top 5 Quietest Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/quietest-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 quietest oxygen concentrators in India for 2026: Home Medix HM-KV (≤40 dB), Nidek Nuvo Lite (40 dB), Philips EverFlo, AirSep Visionaire 5, Oxymed Mini (all 45 dB) — ranked on published bedside sound level and chronic-use suitability.

## Buyer's guides

- [10 LPM oxygen concentrator spec comparison in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/10-lpm-oxygen-concentrator-spec-comparison-india/): A buyer-facing comparison of 10 LPM oxygen concentrators sold in India, with flow range, purity, weight, noise, power draw, OPI, and when a high-flow unit is actually justified.
- [5 LPM oxygen concentrator spec comparison in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/5-lpm-oxygen-concentrator-spec-comparison-india/): A table-first comparison of common 5 LPM oxygen concentrators sold in India, covering flow range, purity, weight, noise, power draw, OPI, certifications, and service-relevant trade-offs.
- [5 LPM vs 10 LPM concentrator: which do I need?](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/5-lpm-vs-10-lpm/): A decision framework for choosing between a 5 LPM and a 10 LPM home oxygen concentrator in India, based on prescribed flow rate, cost, noise, and power draw.
- [AHI score to CPAP vs BiPAP selection](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/ahi-to-cpap-bipap-selection/): How to read your sleep study, what AHI severity tiers mean, when CPAP suffices, when BiPAP becomes the right answer, and Indian PSG context.
- [BiPAP-ST devices in India: backup-rate machines compared](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/bipap-st-devices-india/): A practical guide to BiPAP-ST machines sold in India, explaining backup rate, indications, mode support, pressure ranges, and how ResMed, Philips, BMC, BPL, Oxymed, Deckmount, and Home Medix fit the market.
- [CGHS, ECHS, and ESIC reimbursement for home oxygen therapy](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/cghs-echs-esic-home-oxygen-reimbursement/): How CGHS, ECHS, and ESIC handle home oxygen concentrator and BiPAP reimbursement in India: rate ceilings, prescription requirements, GST treatment, and rejection causes.
- [CPAP comfort features: EPR, Flex, C-Flex, and EPFlex](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/cpap-comfort-features-epr-flex-epflex/): A buyer's guide to CPAP exhalation-relief features across ResMed, Philips, BMC, Oxymed, Home Medix, and other Indian-market devices.
- [CPAP vs BiPAP: clinical decision tree](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/cpap-vs-bipap-indications/): When CPAP is the right therapy, when BiPAP is indicated instead, and how to read your sleep study to decide. Covers OSA severity, central apnea, complex sleep apnea, COPD overlap, and neuromuscular disease.
- [GOLD-stage COPD and the LTOT prescription pathway](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/gold-stage-copd-ltot-pathway/): How GOLD staging maps to long-term oxygen therapy decisions, what the PaO2 thresholds actually mean, and how Indian dealer-channel reality shapes the prescription.
- [GST, import duty, and import-vs-domestic math for respiratory equipment](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/gst-import-duty-respiratory-equipment-india/): How GST and import duty stack up on CPAPs, BiPAPs, and oxygen concentrators in India — and what the price gap to US/EU street price actually buys you.
- [Hill-station oxygen therapy and altitude derating in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/hill-station-oxygen-therapy-altitude-derating/): Why concentrators lose purity at altitude, the typical derating per 1000 m, and what it means for COPD and LTOT patients in Leh, Manali, Gangtok, Shimla, and Ooty.
- [Home Medix vs Oxymed vs Philips EverFlo: 5 LPM India buying guide](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/home-medix-vs-oxymed-vs-philips-everflo-india/): Compare Home Medix HM-KV, Oxymed Mini 5 LPM, and Philips EverFlo for Indian home oxygen buyers: service, warranty, noise, purity display, old-stock risk, and alternatives.
- [Hospital channel vs online channel for respiratory equipment in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/hospital-channel-vs-online-channel-respiratory-equipment/): When buying CPAP, BiPAP, and oxygen concentrators through a hospital channel makes sense vs ordering online — price premium, service, GST, and warranty differences.
- [How to check if an oxygen concentrator is new or refurbished](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/how-to-check-new-vs-refurbished-oxygen-concentrator/): A practical India buyer checklist for identifying new, old-stock, demo, open-box, used, and refurbished oxygen concentrators before payment.
- [How to read an oxygen concentrator spec sheet](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/how-to-read-oxygen-concentrator-spec-sheet/): A field-by-field guide to oxygen concentrator specifications: flow, purity, OPI, sound level, power draw, pressure, altitude, warranty, certifications, and what claims to distrust.
- [Hypercapnic respiratory failure: when BiPAP becomes the right answer](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/hypercapnic-respiratory-failure-bipap-pathway/): Why hypercapnic respiratory failure needs BiPAP rather than CPAP or oxygen alone, the mode-selection logic across S, S/T, and AVAPS, and the home NIV transition pathway.
- [ICU discharge to home oxygen — the first 30 days](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/icu-discharge-home-oxygen-first-30-days/): What the first month of home oxygen looks like after ICU discharge: prescription review, setup, monitoring cadence, weaning, and warning signs that need re-admission.
- [Imported oxygen concentrator spare parts in India: buyer risk guide](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/imported-oxygen-concentrator-spare-parts-india/): How Indian buyers should evaluate imported oxygen concentrator spare-parts availability before buying Philips EverFlo, AirSep, Nidek, DeVilbiss, Invacare, or other imported 5 LPM machines.
- [Lightweight 5 LPM oxygen concentrators in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/lightweight-5-lpm-concentrators-india/): A comparison of lighter 5 LPM stationary oxygen concentrators in India, focused on caregiver handling, room-to-room movement, power draw, noise, and when weight should affect the buying decision.
- [Low-noise oxygen concentrators in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/low-noise-oxygen-concentrators-india/): A practical guide to low-noise oxygen concentrators for bedroom and night use, with published dB levels, placement rules, and why small dB differences matter.
- [Monsoon respiratory equipment care in coastal India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/monsoon-respiratory-equipment-care-coastal-india/): How coastal humidity in Mumbai, Chennai, Kochi, and Kolkata accelerates wear on concentrators, CPAPs, and BiPAPs — with a monthly maintenance schedule for the monsoon.
- [Old stock oxygen concentrators in India: how to avoid a bad buy](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/old-stock-oxygen-concentrator-india/): How Indian buyers should identify old-stock, COVID-era, demo, open-box, rental-return, and refurbished oxygen concentrators before paying for a machine sold as new.
- [Oxygen concentrator compressor replacement cost in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-compressor-replacement-cost-india/): How Indian buyers should think about oxygen concentrator compressor replacement: symptoms, diagnosis, warranty exclusions, spare availability, and model-selection impact.
- [Oxygen concentrator dealer near me: India buyer checklist](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-dealer-near-me-india/): How to choose an oxygen concentrator dealer near you in India: service proof, serial-number checks, same-day delivery, warranty, spares, and city-specific buying rules.
- [Best oxygen concentrator for COPD patient at home in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-for-copd-patient-india/): How Indian caregivers should choose an oxygen concentrator for COPD home oxygen: flow prescription, LTOT hours, noise, power cost, alarms, service, and 5 LPM model shortlist.
- [Best oxygen concentrator for elderly home use in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-for-elderly-at-home-india/): How to choose an oxygen concentrator for an elderly patient at home in India: alarms, SOS, noise, weight, caregiver handling, service, warranty, and model shortlist.
- [Oxygen concentrator for night use in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-for-night-use-india/): Buyer guide for using an oxygen concentrator at night in India: continuous flow, noise, alarms, power backup, tubing, fire safety, serviceability, and 5 LPM model shortlist.
- [Oxygen concentrator power backup guide for India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-power-backup-india/): How to size a stabilizer, UPS, or inverter for an oxygen concentrator in India, with practical VA math for 5 LPM and 10 LPM machines.
- [Oxygen concentrator repair cost in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-repair-cost-india/): Buyer and caregiver guide to oxygen concentrator repair cost in India: diagnosis, filters, flowmeter, valves, PCB, sieve beds, compressor, warranty disputes, and downtime planning.
- [Oxygen concentrator service centre near me: India checklist](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-service-centre-near-me-india/): How Indian buyers should verify an oxygen concentrator service centre near them before buying: pincode support, spares, loaner units, warranty handling, and city-service risk.
- [Oxygen concentrator service network guide for India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-service-network-india/): How to evaluate service access before buying an oxygen concentrator in India: authorized service, compressor swaps, sieve-bed replacement, warranty exclusions, loaner units, and pincode-level support.
- [Oxygen concentrator sieve bed replacement cost in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-sieve-bed-replacement-cost-india/): How to evaluate oxygen concentrator sieve-bed replacement in India: symptoms, purity testing, warranty limits, humidity risk, spare availability, and repair-versus-replace decisions.
- [Oxygen concentrator spare parts and service cost in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-spare-parts-service-cost-india/): India guide to oxygen concentrator service costs: compressor, sieve bed, filters, valves, PCB repairs, warranty risks, loaner units, and spares to verify before buying.
- [Oxygen concentrator warranty and serial number check in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-warranty-serial-number-check-india/): How to verify oxygen concentrator warranty, serial number, invoice, stock age, refurbished risk, and authorised service before buying in India.
- [Oxygen concentrator with nebulizer in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-with-nebulizer-india/): Should Indian buyers choose an oxygen concentrator with nebulizer? Compare integrated nebulization, outlet pressure, COPD use, separate nebulizer tradeoffs, and 5 LPM model choices.
- [Oxygen concentrators with purity display in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-with-purity-display-india/): Buyer guide to oxygen concentrators with OPI, OCI, and live oxygen purity display in India: what the feature means, who needs it, and which 5 LPM models to shortlist.
- [Which oxygen concentrator should you buy? The India buyer's guide (2026)](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrators-buyers-guide-india/): How to choose a home oxygen concentrator in India: match prescribed LPM to device class, decide 5 vs 10 LPM and stationary vs portable, check the specs that matter, and pick a brand by service reach.
- [Oxygen cylinder vs concentrator for home use](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-cylinder-vs-concentrator/): Comparing oxygen cylinders and concentrators for long-term home use in India: reliability, purity, logistics, cost of ownership, safety, and when cylinders are still the right answer.
- [Philips EverFlo discontinued: India alternatives for 5 LPM buyers](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/philips-everflo-discontinued-india-alternatives/): What Indian buyers should do now that Philips EverFlo is discontinued globally: old-stock risks, spare-parts questions, and 5 LPM alternatives including Oxymed Mini and Home Medix HM-KV.
- [Philips EverFlo replacement in India: what to buy instead](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/philips-everflo-replacement-india/): How Indian buyers should choose a Philips EverFlo replacement in 2026: Oxymed Mini, Home Medix HM-KV, Nidek, AirSep, and DeVilbiss compared by service, spares, warranty, stock age, and home-use fit.
- [Portable vs stationary: choosing the right concentrator](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/portable-vs-stationary-concentrator/): How to choose between a portable oxygen concentrator (POC) and a stationary home unit: continuous flow vs pulse dose, battery life, flight rules for travel from India, and who each class actually suits.
- [Quiet and lightweight 5 LPM oxygen concentrators in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/quiet-lightweight-5-lpm-oxygen-concentrators-india/): Combined buyer guide for quiet, lightweight 5 LPM oxygen concentrators in India: bedroom use, caregiver handling, Home Medix HM-KV, Oxymed Mini, Nidek, AirSep, and EverFlo caveats.
- [Should you buy Philips EverFlo in India now?](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/should-you-buy-philips-everflo-india/): A 2026 India buyer guide for Philips EverFlo: when it is still worth considering, when to avoid it, what Philips officially says about Respironics supply constraints, and what alternatives to compare.
- [SpO2 to flow rate: how oxygen prescription is set](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/spo2-to-flow-rate-prescription/): How clinicians translate a measured SpO2 deficit into a concentrator flow rate, when 1-2 LPM is enough, when escalation is needed, and how Indian conditions shift the math.
- [TVAPS, AVAPS, and iVAPS devices in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/tvaps-avaps-ivaps-devices-india/): A guide to volume-assured bilevel modes in India: TVAPS, AVAPS, iVAPS, eVAPS, who needs them, what device specs to verify, and how available machines compare.
- [Voltage stabiliser sizing for oxygen concentrators in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/voltage-stabiliser-sizing-concentrators-india/): How to size a voltage stabiliser for a home oxygen concentrator on Indian mains: VA math, servo vs relay, brand pick, monsoon protection, and when a UPS is needed instead.

## 5 LPM city buying pages

- [Best 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in Bangalore for Home Use](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/5-lpm/bangalore/): Buying a 5 LPM oxygen concentrator in Bangalore? HHZ shortlists Home Medix HM-KV, Oxymed Mini, and verified imported options, with price bands, service checks, and old-stock warnings.
- [Best 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in Mumbai for Home Use](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/5-lpm/mumbai/): Buying a 5 LPM oxygen concentrator in Mumbai? HHZ puts Oxymed Mini first where service is proven, with Home Medix HM-KV as a value alternative and imported-stock caveats.
- [Best 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in Delhi for Home Use](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/5-lpm/delhi/): Buying a 5 LPM oxygen concentrator in Delhi? HHZ puts Oxymed Mini first where service is proven, with Home Medix HM-KV as a value alternative and imported-brand risk checks.
- [Best 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in Chennai for Home Use](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/5-lpm/chennai/): Buying a 5 LPM oxygen concentrator in Chennai? Compare Home Medix HM-KV, Oxymed Mini, imported options, humid-city service risk, and dealer verification steps.
- [Best 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in Pune for Home Use](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/5-lpm/pune/): Buying a 5 LPM oxygen concentrator in Pune? HHZ puts Home Medix HM-KV first where service is confirmed, with Oxymed Mini as the Indian-service alternative and imported-stock caveats.
- [Best 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in Hyderabad for Home Use](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/5-lpm/hyderabad/): Buying a 5 LPM oxygen concentrator in Hyderabad? HHZ covers Home Medix HM-KV, Oxymed Mini, imported-brand risk, price bands, delivery, and service checks.

- [Oxygen Concentrator Repair in Bangalore: Cost and Service Checklist](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/repair/bangalore/): City-specific oxygen concentrator repair guide for Bangalore: repair-cost categories, compressor and sieve-bed diagnosis, purity testing, warranty disputes, and repair-versus-replace decisions.
- [Oxygen Concentrator Dealers in Bangalore: What to Verify Before Buying](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/dealers/bangalore/): City-specific oxygen concentrator dealers guide for Bangalore: GST invoice, serial-number checks, stock age, new-vs-refurbished risk, service proof, and spare availability.

- [Oxygen Concentrator Rental in Bangalore: Rent vs Buy Checklist](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/rental/bangalore/): City-specific oxygen concentrator rental guide for Bangalore: when to rent, when to buy, 5 LPM monthly rental bands, deposit checks, fleet-condition risks, and model shortlist logic.

- [Oxygen Concentrator Service Centre in Hyderabad: Buyer Checklist](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/service/hyderabad/): City-specific oxygen concentrator service guide for Hyderabad: pincode support, model service proof, compressor and sieve-bed spares, warranty handling, loaner units, and imported-brand risk.
- [Oxygen Concentrator Repair in Hyderabad: Cost and Service Checklist](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/repair/hyderabad/): City-specific oxygen concentrator repair guide for Hyderabad: repair-cost categories, compressor and sieve-bed diagnosis, purity testing, warranty disputes, and repair-versus-replace decisions.
- [Oxygen Concentrator Dealers in Hyderabad: What to Verify Before Buying](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/dealers/hyderabad/): City-specific oxygen concentrator dealers guide for Hyderabad: GST invoice, serial-number checks, stock age, new-vs-refurbished risk, service proof, and spare availability.
- [Oxygen Concentrator Price in Hyderabad: 5 LPM Buying Bands](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/price/hyderabad/): City-specific oxygen concentrator price guide for Hyderabad: 5 LPM price bands, Home Medix and Oxymed positioning, imported-brand caveats, invoice checks, and rent-vs-buy logic.
- [Oxygen Concentrator Rental in Hyderabad: Rent vs Buy Checklist](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/rental/hyderabad/): City-specific oxygen concentrator rental guide for Hyderabad: when to rent, when to buy, 5 LPM monthly rental bands, deposit checks, fleet-condition risks, and model shortlist logic.

## Written comparison pages

- [AirSep Intensity 10 vs Home Medix HM-KX 10 LPM: industrial import or quiet domestic high-flow?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/airsep-intensity-10-vs-home-medix-10-lpm/): AirSep Intensity 10 (~₹1,68,000, 26.3 kg, 55 dB, FDA-approved, 10,000 ft altitude) vs Home Medix HM-KX (~₹65,000, 25.6 kg, ≤48 dB field-verified, CDSCO) — an industrial-duty US import against a quieter, cheaper Indian-brand 10 LPM.
- [Airsep Visionaire 5 vs DeVilbiss 5 LPM: which imported 5 LPM concentrator is the better Indian buy?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/airsep-visionaire-5-vs-devilbiss-5-lpm/): Airsep Visionaire 5 (₹54,999, 13.6 kg, 290 W) vs DeVilbiss 5 LPM (₹45,984, 16.3 kg, 310 W, 13,123 ft) — the ₹9,000 gap between two US-designed 5 LPM stationaries decoded for Indian prescriptions.
- [Airsep Visionaire 5 vs Dr Diaz 5 LPM: premium import vs Indian budget pick](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/airsep-visionaire-5-vs-dr-diaz-5-lpm/): The Visionaire brings FDA approval, 290 W efficiency, and the full alarm suite. The Dr Diaz undercuts by ₹25,000 with 13 psi outlet and Indian service.
- [AirSep Visionaire 5 vs Home Medix HM-KV 5 LPM: US-import legacy at ₹54,999 or Indian mid-tier at ₹37,800?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/airsep-visionaire-5-vs-home-medix-5-lpm/): AirSep Visionaire 5 (₹54,999, 13.6 kg, 45 dB, 10,000 ft altitude, US FDA + CE) vs Home Medix HM-KV 5 LPM (₹37,800, 13 kg, ≤ 40 dB field-verified, AC ±10%, CDSCO + ISO 13485) — a ₹17,199 spread split between US-import paperwork and Indian-tuned operating envelope.
- [Airsep Visionaire 5 vs Nareena 5 LPM Single Flow: imported specs vs Indian budget](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/airsep-visionaire-5-vs-nareena-5-lpm-single-flow/): The Visionaire wins decisively on power, altitude, certifications, and warranty. The Nareena's only real advantage is ₹19,000 of saved upfront cost.
- [Airsep Visionaire 5 vs Oxymed Mini 5 LPM: imported efficiency vs Indian service footprint](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/airsep-visionaire-5-vs-oxymed-mini-5-lpm/): The Visionaire 5 wins on altitude, power draw, and certifications. The Oxymed Mini wins on price, analyzer, and dealer density. Here is who should buy which.

Visionaire is lighter and higher altitude. Everflo wins on price and dealer depth. Full call inside.

Use-case fit decides the call.

- [Nareena 5 LPM Single Flow vs Home Medix HM-KV 5 LPM](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nareena-5-lpm-single-flow-vs-home-medix-5-lpm/): Nareena 5 LPM Single Flow at ₹35,510 vs Home Medix HM-KV at ₹37,800 — HM-KV is 2 kg lighter, 10 dB quieter, draws 230 W less, runs the full alarm suite, and is the cleanly better 5 LPM unit for ₹2,290 more.
- [Nareena 5 LPM vs Nidek Nuvo Lite: Indian budget pick vs American reference?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nareena-5-lpm-single-flow-vs-nidek-nuvo-lite-5-lpm/): The Nareena costs ₹22,089 less, but the Nidek is lighter, quieter, draws 260W less power, and carries FDA + CE approvals. Which one wins the clinical home oxygen argument?
- [Nareena 5 LPM Single Flow vs Oxymed Mini (5L): which is the better 5 LPM buy in India?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nareena-5-lpm-single-flow-vs-oxymed-mini-5-lpm/): Priced within ₹110 of each other — Nareena at ₹35,510 vs Oxymed Mini at ₹35,400. On published specs, Oxymed Mini dominates. Full call inside.
- [Nareena 5 LPM Single Flow vs Philips Everflo 5 LPM: which is the better 5 LPM buy in India?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nareena-5-lpm-single-flow-vs-philips-everflo-5-lpm/): Nareena lists at ₹35,510 against Everflo's ₹43,699 (since discontinued). Everflo runs 200 W lower and 5 dB quieter on the spec sheet. Here's the honest call.
- [Nareena 5 LPM (Single Flow) vs S.Cure 5 LPM: India-made OPI versus Chinese low-power alarm](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nareena-5-lpm-single-flow-vs-s-cure-5-lpm/): Nareena at Rs. 35,510, 15 kg, 50 dB, 550 W, OPI present, India HQ. S.Cure at Rs. 44,160, 16 kg, 48 dB, 285 W, no OPI but has system-malfunction and loss-of-power alarms.
- [Nareena 5 LPM Single Flow vs Yuwell 9F Touchscreen: lighter Indian-made or heavier Chinese legacy?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nareena-5-lpm-single-flow-vs-yuwell-9f-touchscreen-5lpm/): Nareena 5 LPM Single Flow (₹35,510, 15 kg, 550 W, OPI) vs Yuwell 9F (₹45,120, 18 kg, 400 W, touchscreen, built-in oximeter) — two middle-segment 5 LPMs with different compromises.
- [Nidek Nuvo Lite 5 LPM vs Oxymed Mini 5 LPM: premium quiet vs Indian service king](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nidek-nuvo-lite-5-lpm-vs-oxymed-mini-5-lpm/): The Nidek brings 40 dB, 290 W, and FDA approval. The Oxymed Mini brings ₹22,000 lower price, 50-city service, and a real-time purity analyzer.
- [Nidek Nuvo Lite 5 LPM vs Philips Everflo 5 LPM: quiet efficiency vs service ubiquity](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/nidek-nuvo-lite-5-lpm-vs-philips-everflo-5-lpm/): The Nidek Nuvo Lite wins on sound (40 dB), power (290 W), and weight. The Philips Everflo wins on service network, alarm suite, and upfront price.
- [Oxymed Mini (5L) vs Philips Everflo 5 LPM: which is the better 5 LPM buy in India?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/oxymed-mini-5-lpm-vs-philips-everflo-5-lpm/): Oxymed Mini lists at ₹35,400 and Philips Everflo at ₹43,699 (since discontinued). On paper they share 5 LPM flow and 45 dB noise — here's the honest split.
- [Oxymed Mini 5 LPM vs S.Cure 5 LPM: which 5 LPM actually belongs in an Indian home?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/oxymed-mini-5-lpm-vs-s-cure-5-lpm/): Oxymed Mini 5 LPM (₹35,400, 13.9 kg, 45 dB, live purity analyzer, 3 alarms) vs S.Cure 5 LPM (₹44,160, 16 kg, 48 dB, no OPI, 2 alarms) — the cheaper unit is also the better buy.
- [Oxymed Mini 5 LPM vs Vandelay 5L (with Nebulizer): which 5 LPM is the safer Indian buy?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/oxymed-mini-5-lpm-vs-vandelay-5l-with-nebulizer/): Oxymed Mini 5 LPM (₹35,400, 13.9 kg, live purity analyzer, 3 alarms, 3-year warranty) vs Vandelay 5L (₹33,600, 14.5 kg, no OPI, no alarms) — ₹1,800 gap for a full safety suite and Indian service network.
- [Oxymed Mini 5 LPM vs Veayva 5 litre: is the ₹7,560 saving worth the certification gap?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/oxymed-mini-5-lpm-vs-veayva-5-litre/): Oxymed Mini 5 LPM (₹35,400, 13.9 kg, 45 dB, CDSCO, live purity analyzer) vs Veayva 5 litre (₹27,840, 16 kg, 48 dB, no CDSCO marker) — which Indian-stocked 5 LPM wins at the budget end.
- [Oxymed Mini vs Yuwell 9F Touchscreen: the clearest winner in the sub-₹50,000 5 LPM segment](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/oxymed-mini-5-lpm-vs-yuwell-9f-touchscreen-5lpm/): At ₹35,400 vs ₹45,120, the Oxymed Mini is lighter, quieter, better monitored, 3-year-warranted, and backed by India's widest concentrator service network. The Yuwell 9F loses on every axis.
- [Philips Everflo vs S.Cure 5 LPM: is the S.Cure's near-identical price defensible?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/philips-everflo-5-lpm-vs-s-cure-5-lpm/): At ₹44,160, the S.Cure is priced within ₹500 of the Everflo — but gives up OPI, FDA and CE approvals, and the full alarm suite. Here is why the Everflo wins at near-parity pricing.
- [Philips Everflo vs Vandelay 5L with Nebulizer: does the built-in neb justify the trade?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/philips-everflo-5-lpm-vs-vandelay-5l-with-nebulizer/): The Vandelay ships ₹10,099 cheaper and bundles a nebulizer, but gives up OPI, FDA approval, and the full alarm suite. Here is when either buy makes sense.
- [Philips Everflo vs Veayva 5 LPM: which 5 LPM concentrator earns the Indian living room?](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/philips-everflo-5-lpm-vs-veayva-5-litre/): The Everflo costs ₹15,859 more than the Veayva but carries OPI, US FDA approval, and a 3-year warranty the Veayva lacks — here is when that premium makes sense.
- [Philips Everflo 5 LPM vs Yuwell 9F Touchscreen 5 LPM: FDA default vs Chinese challenger](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/philips-everflo-5-lpm-vs-yuwell-9f-touchscreen-5lpm/): The Everflo brings FDA approval, 14 kg weight, and Philips's service network. The Yuwell 9F brings a touchscreen and pulse oximeter but at 18 kg and 52 dB.

## Category hubs

- [Oxygen concentrators](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/): oxygen concentrator catalogue, reviews, and category guides
- [CPAP machines](https://homehealthzone.com/cpap/): CPAP catalogue, reviews, and CPAP guidance
- [BiPAP machines](https://homehealthzone.com/bipap/): BiPAP catalogue, reviews, and NIV guidance
- [Head-to-head comparisons](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/): side-by-side product comparisons

## Full content corpus

- [llms-full.txt](https://homehealthzone.com/llms-full.txt): concatenated editorial corpus for LLM ingestion
- [sitemap-index.xml](https://homehealthzone.com/sitemap-index.xml): generated sitemap index for all public URLs
- [robots.txt](https://homehealthzone.com/robots.txt): AI crawlers are explicitly allowlisted
